name_cn:
In-stock original leather Rouge!!️
DIOR Lady Suede Bing dynamic dazzling bold sci-fi visual impact is stunning🤤 The entire bag has a pearlescent laser effect, like a rainbow, very stunning! Paired with silver metal adds tension, so eye-catching👍 The contrast between elegance and coolness is unique. You must carry it out and walk around once you get it😌 It is truly excessively beautiful!!✔️
Size;20×16.5×8cm
